title: Junior Manager Marketing Operations Global E-Commerce
required_skills: 1+ years in project management, operations, or coordination within e-commerce/digital marketing
Proficiency with project management tools (Asana, Notion, Monday.com, Jira)
Confident working with data and building reporting dashboards
High EQ: managing upward/sideways, clear communication
Academically strong: degree from leading university in Business/Management/Marketing
matched_skills: Master of Management & Entrepreneurship from Leuphana University
Cross-functional project coordination (HSBC — C-suite level, multi-team)
SOPs and process documentation (IPC — sales training materials, SOPs)
missing_skills: Asana/Notion/Monday.com experience (Jira is in CV, which covers project tool requirement)
core_responsibilities: Support Customer Service Operations and vendor partnership management
Track CS performance metrics and consolidate into leadership reporting
Project management across Digital Marketing Team (MarTech, SEO, CRM, Paid Media)
Run weekly team syncs, document processes, build SOPs
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC cross-functional coordination role — direct match to 'connective tissue' description
Highlight JIRA proficiency as project management tool match
Frame Hapag-Lloyd agile sprint management as equivalent Asana/project tool experience
IPC SOP development and process documentation are explicit matches
Moli Media e-commerce and HSBC C-suite reporting are strong signals

company_info.size_raw: PUMA supports over 21,000 employees across 120+ countries
